//: Build config for the stream-backend extension pack. `rayspec` serve/deploy runs on a compiled JavaScript runtime, so a pack whose entry/handlers are authored in `.ts` must be compiled to `.js` before deploy. This transpiles the pack's `index.ts` + `handlers/*.ts` to ESM `.js` (see build.mjs). `noCheck` (transpile-only) needs no dependency resolution: the handler modules import `@rayspec/handler-sdk` type-only (erased), and the entry keeps its `@rayspec/platform` value import (resolved from the workspace at load).
